created_for: Looped decoder ablations using identity-preserving MLX Full Attention Residuals
notes: Full AttnRes scripts keep the optimized AttnResHistory cache.
Full AttnRes sources are post-residual hidden states, not raw attention/MLP deltas.
The normal additive residual stream is preserved; AttnRes chooses sublayer inputs.
DepthMixer uses a dynamic recency prior so initialization is near latest-source identity.
XSA-enabled scripts default to fixed paper-faithful projection removal.
Full AttnRes scripts support MAX_VAL_TOKENS and SKIP_QUANTIZED_VALIDATION for fast smoke triage.
